subcodes.first_line: O thou favored maidservant in the Threshold of the Almighty! The letter which thou hast written was perused and its contents were noted…. Treat all thy friends and relatives, even strangers, with a spirit of utmost love and kindliness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز مقرب درگاه کبریا مکتوب مرقوم ملاحظه گردید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل شد در
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
